allow: PowerShell(& "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\tools\\bin\\avdmanager.bat" list avd 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Output "avdmanager not found at default path" }; $sdkPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; if \(Test-Path $sdkPath\) { Write-Output "SDK found: $sdkPath" } else { Write-Output "Android SDK not found at $sdkPath" })
